visible_title: Codex browser-control protected process binding failure
visible_text:
On macOS Codex Desktop browser_control fails before extension handshake with TypeError: protected global process binding rejected assignment.
Stack: browser-client.mjs module_initialization js.global-process-shim-redefinition.v1
Workaround: remove the protected-process shim from browser-client.mjs
```bash
# remove globalThis.process shim block
```
Conclusion: this is caused by the global process shim redefinition.
